full_text:
An update for osinfo-db is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The osinfo-db package contains a database that provides information about operating systems and hypervisor platforms to facilitate the automated configuration and provisioning of new virtual machines. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [FJ10.0 Bug]: virt-install fails if argument --osinfo is not set (JIRA:RHEL-109774)
